title: Verify existing implementation of deepMerge utility
description: The deepMerge function and comprehensive tests already exist in src/utils/object-helpers.ts and src/utils/object-helpers.test.ts. Implementation covers: basic merge, nested recursive merge, arrays (replacement), Date/RegExp/Map/Set cloning, null/undefined handling, and mixed structures. Tests verify no mutation of inputs.
existing_patterns: src/utils/object-helpers.ts: Single-function utility module with JSDoc comments
Co-located .test.ts files in src/utils/ following vitest conventions
